answer: Bank withdrawals may take 1 to 3 business days after approval. [Cash withdrawal processing §chunk_7]
If an account is under compliance review, withdrawals remain pending until the review is completed. [Cash withdrawal processing §chunk_9]
If a user forgets their password, they can request a reset email from the login page. [Password reset and account recovery §chunk_1]
Proof of address documents must show the user's full name, address, and issue date. [Document verification requirements §chunk_12]
Demo profit cannot be withdrawn. [Demo account behaviour §chunk_18]
